creator: phoemix@harmless.hu
text:
Hello,

By any chance, don't you know when will be a fix committed to the ports
tree?

On Wed, 12 Aug 2009 00:38:35 +1100
Maxim Vetrov <muxas@mail.ru> wrote:

> Hi!
> 
> I've got the same on 7.2. The reason is that uuid-ossp contrib module 
> depends on misc/ossp-uuid port which is not listed in the dependency 
> list. The solutions I found are either install misc/ossp-uuid or  
> correct pkg-plist-contrib file. In my case, I corrected plist file
> for misc/ossp-uuid port conflicts with installed
> misc/e2fsprogs-libuuid.
> 
> Regards,
> Vetrov Maxim



-- 
Sincerely,
Gergely CZUCZY
Harmless Digital Bt

+36-30-9702963
